name: Telegram → captures/inbox (Mobile Capture)

parameters.text: =✅ Captured `{{ $('Build capture file').item.json.id }}` as {{ $('Build capture file').item.json.command }}. I'll triage it on the next run.

_setup_notes: Replace the 4 REPLACE_WITH_* placeholders: Telegram credential id (3 nodes), your numeric Telegram user id, and a fine-grained GitHub PAT (repo Contents: read+write).
Repo is prefilled as shinyamadasan/Meal-Prep — change the URL if it differs.
Prefer moving the GitHub PAT into an n8n 'Header Auth' credential instead of the inline Authorization header before going live.
Get your Telegram user id by messaging @userinfobot.
typeVersions reflect a recent n8n; if import complains, let n8n auto-upgrade the nodes.
This workflow ONLY creates files in captures/inbox/. Triage + routing happen in the Claude run (see WORKFLOW.md).
